summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 and REQ-2 well. A new PublicNavigationBar component is added with all four Polish-labeled sections, sticky positioning, active visual indicator (underline), responsive labels (full on sm+, abbreviated on mobile), and smooth tab-switching via conditional rendering. PublicPage.tsx is updated to use this bar and renders sections conditionally. The PublicSectionsTiles component file is modified (likely to remove it from PublicPage). All acceptance criteria appear to be met.
